raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, a XXXX XXXX was triple charged to my credit card in the amount of {$430.00}. I filed a dispute with the CITI credit card. CITI claimed that the reason for the dispute was paid by other means, which I disagree with. It's a simple credit card transaction that was triple charged and I'm not sure why CITI is claiming the " other means '' reason and requesting a copy of the check. 

I contacted CITI credit card on several occasions and spoke with XXXX a manager in the disputes department who told me that I'm out of luck. Unless I provide a copy of the cancelled check there's nothing, she can do for me. CITI credit card is refusing to do anything about this dispute.
